_comment: Hand-labeled ground truth for transcript_01_kickoff.txt. This is the HONEST golden set (doc 16.7) — written by a human, not generated, so LLM-grading-LLM stays non-circular. Conforms to ExtractionResultSchema in packages/agents/schemas/item.schema.ts. meeting date assumed 2026-06-22 for deadline resolution.

items.text: Use MongoDB for the first cut of the project.
items.source_quote: Decision: we'll use MongoDB for the first cut.

items.text: Stand up the MongoDB database and base collections.
items.source_quote: I'll have the MongoDB instance and the base collections ready by Friday.

dependency_hints: can't wire the live data until Rahul's database is up
depends on the database being ready
items.source_quote: Sreya owns the dashboard UI, depends on the database being ready. Let's target the UI shell by June 27th.

dependency_hints: once there's an endpoint to hit
items.source_quote: I'll handle the API tests once there's an endpoint to hit. No firm date yet, sometime after the UI shell.
